models.title: OpenAI ends Microsoft legal peril over its $50B Amazon deal
models.summary: OpenAI has won major concessions from its largest shareholder, Microsoft, that will allow it to sell products on AWS, while Microsoft gets more cash in a revenue-share agreement.
models.title_zh: OpenAI结束微软在亚马逊$ 500亿交易中的法律风险
models.summary_zh: OpenAI赢得了其最大股东微软的重大让步，这将使其能够在AWS上销售产品，而微软则通过收入分成协议获得更多现金。
models.title_en: OpenAI ends Microsoft legal peril over its $50B Amazon deal
models.summary_en: OpenAI has won major concessions from its largest shareholder, Microsoft, that will allow it to sell products on AWS, while Microsoft gets more cash in a revenue-share agreement.

models.title: DeepMind’s David Silver just raised $1.1B to build an AI that learns without human data
models.summary: Ineffable Intelligence, a British AI lab founded a mere few months ago by former DeepMind researcher David Silver, has raised $1.1 billion in funding at a valuation of $5.1 billion.
models.title_zh: DeepMind的David Silver刚刚筹集了11亿美元，用于构建在没有人类数据的情况下学习的人工智能
models.summary_zh: 几个月前由前DeepMind研究员大卫·西尔弗（ David Silver ）创立的英国人工智能实验室Ineffable Intelligence已经筹集了11亿美元的资金，估值为51亿美元。
models.title_en: DeepMind’s David Silver just raised $1.1B to build an AI that learns without human data
models.summary_en: Ineffable Intelligence, a British AI lab founded a mere few months ago by former DeepMind researcher David Silver, has raised $1.1 billion in funding at a valuation of $5.1 billion.

models.title: Investors back Skye’s AI home screen app for iPhone ahead of launch
models.summary: Skye's new AI app attracted investors before it even launched — a sign of interest in a more AI-aware iPhone.
models.title_zh: 投资者在推出前支持Skye的iPhone AI主屏幕应用程序
models.summary_zh: Skye的新人工智能应用程序在推出之前就吸引了投资者--这表明人们对更具人工智能意识的iPhone感兴趣。
models.title_en: Investors back Skye’s AI home screen app for iPhone ahead of launch
models.summary_en: Skye's new AI app attracted investors before it even launched — a sign of interest in a more AI-aware iPhone.

models.title: China blocks Meta’s $2B Manus deal after months-long probe
models.summary: China has ordered Meta to unwind its multibillion-dollar Manus acquisition, dealing a potential setback to Zuckerberg’s push into AI agents.
models.title_zh: 经过长达数月的调查，中国阻止了Meta的$ 2B Manus交易
models.summary_zh: 中国已下令Meta撤销其价值数十亿美元的Manus收购，这对扎克伯格进军人工智能代理商造成了潜在的挫折。
models.title_en: China blocks Meta’s $2B Manus deal after months-long probe
models.summary_en: China has ordered Meta to unwind its multibillion-dollar Manus acquisition, dealing a potential setback to Zuckerberg’s push into AI agents.
